nivāsaṃ.sutta_1: “icchāma mayaṃ, bhante, pacchābhūmaṃ janapadaṃ gantuṃ, pacchābhūme janapade nivāsaṃ kappetun”ti.
nivāsaṃ.example_1: “Sir, we wish to go to a western land to take up residence there.”
nivāsaṃ.comment: nivāsaṃ kappetunti to live; to stay; to reside

nānāverajjagataṃ.example_1: “Reverends, there are those who question a mendicant who has gone abroad—
